name: Oscar Best Picture Winners
description: Academy Award Best Picture winners from Wings through the 98th Academy Awards.

question_templates.prompt: {category} whose name begins with a consonant
{category} containing at least one of the letters P, O, I, N, T, L, E or S
{category} with names of six letters or fewer

Birdman or (The Unexpected Virtue of Ignorance)
